name: Mango-Macadamia Muffins
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons butter (1/2 stick), melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. For topping: Combine all ingredients except butter in a small bowl; mash with a fork or rub in with your fingertips; chill until needed.
3. Grease a 12-cup muffin tin, ensuring the area around each well is lightly greased to prevent sticking during rising.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together egg, sour cream, milk, vanilla extract, and melted butter. Fold in mango.
5. In another large bowl, stir together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the mango mixture. Fold together just to moisten and blend evenly; the batter will be lumpy.
6. Quickly fill muffin wells with batter, crumbing topping over each. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with only a few crumbs clinging to it.
7. Cool in the pan for 5-10 minutes, then loosen muffins and tilt each side to cool further. Serve warm or at room temperature.
YIELD: 12 muffins
